title: Dyeable Jack o'Lanterns
description: Adds the feature to dye carved pumpkins and Jack O'Lanterns
body:
This mod allows you to dye carved pumpkins and Jack o'Lanterns using all default Minecraft dyes.

To dye a pumpkin, simply place it in the crafting grid next to the dye of your chosen color.
![All new blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d5741027076f74286f517ec09e2ba56d4f0803b.jpeg)



There are now 16 carved pumpkins and 16 Jack o'Lanterns

You are free to include this mod in your modpacks
